---
title: "Data Summary Practice"
subtitle: "A first useful agent task"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

# Goal

Use an AI agent to create a first-pass data summary that is actually useful for later analysis.

# Dataset

Choose one:

- `data/synthetic/simulated_maternal_health_data.csv`
- `data/simulated/neighborhood_health_survey_analysis.csv`
- `data/simulated/new_parent_wellness_survey.csv`

# Your Task

Use an agent to help create an exploratory summary notebook.

Go beyond generic summary statistics. Your output should help a collaborator understand what the dataset is, what variables matter, what is missing, and what analysis tasks are plausible.

# Acceptance Criteria

Your notebook should include:

- Dataset dimensions.
- Variable names and likely variable types.
- Missingness summary.
- At least one table of important categorical variables.
- At least one table of important numeric variables.
- At least two plots.
- A short written summary of what the dataset can and cannot support.
- A short list of checks you performed on the AI output.

# Work Area

```{r}
# Start here.
```
